features.name: tip_base
features.description: Flat bottom portion of the tip that sits on the bed. Provides a solid floor under the convex arc.

features.name: tip_convex_arc
features.description: Convex circular arc on top of the tip. R=4.4mm, sag=4.2mm. Displaces caulk sideways when pressed into waffle channel. Printed as staircase layers (no bridge).

features.name: tip_nose
features.description: Rounded leading edge of the tip. Sphere-based rounding at X=0 for smooth channel entry. Radius matches tip arc radius (4.4mm).

features.name: taper_zone
features.description: Linear transition from tip cross-section (8.8mm W x 5.4mm H) to handle cross-section (18mm W x 10mm H) over 15mm. Bottom stays flat on bed. Width and height increase linearly. Fillet radius grows from 0 to 3mm.

features.name: handle_body
features.description: Straight rectangular handle section with 3mm filleted top edges. 18mm wide x 10mm tall, approximately 96mm long (from end of taper to start of tail rounding). Solid cross-section, no thin walls.

features.name: handle_tail
features.description: Rounded tail end of handle. Semicircular rounding in XY plane (R=9mm = handle_width/2). Created by intersecting handle extrusion with a cylinder. Provides comfortable grip end with no sharp corners.

printOrientation.bed_face: bottom (flat face of handle and tip base)
printOrientation.z_direction: height of tool (convex arc apex and handle top face upward)

specDeviations.reason: spec.json originally listed z=10.8 but requirements.md clearly states overall height = handle height = 10.0mm. No feature exceeds 10.0mm. Corrected spec.json to z=10.0 to match requirements.
